title: Nemonic RP
description: Official Nemonic community modpack. Only essential mods for optimization and a complete experience on our server. Modpack used in Season 1 - Velmora
body:
A complete immersive modpack designed for our Minecraft RP server, focused on delivering the full intended roleplay experience. This pack includes visual enhancements, realistic player animations, voice chat, custom character models, improved immersion, performance optimizations, and quality-of-life features.
All mods included in this pack are required to ensure compatibility and to experience the server exactly as intended by the developers. Perfect for players who want a cinematic, immersive, and highly interactive RP environment.
